name: guardian-security-scan
description: Guardian scans npm and Python projects for package risk and checks proposed dependencies before installation.

interface.shortDescription: Scan project dependencies for known supply-chain risk.
interface.longDescription: Guardian gives Codex a practical dependency-risk workflow for modern projects. It checks proposed npm and Python packages before installation, inventories project dependencies, matches exact versions against advisory and exploit-intelligence sources, detects likely typosquats and new install behavior, separates credible runtime exposure from metadata noise, and tracks what changed between scans. Use it before package installs, releases, dependency changes, or evidence-backed remediation work.
defaultPrompt: Check this package before I install it.
Scout this public GitHub repo with temporary state.
